title: Eriosorus longipetiolatus
taxonomy: Eriosorus longipetiolatus is classified in the family of plants known as Pteridaceae, commonly referred to as the bracken or maidenhair fern family. This plant belongs to the genus Eriosorus within the family Pteridaceae. Eriosorus longipetiolatus is a species of fern that is native to South America. The classification of Eriosorus longipetiolatus places it within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Further classification places it in the class Polypodiopsida.
